subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast drawn illumination from the niche of mysteries! By thy life, verily the heart is in rapture and the soul is in ecstasy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اقتبس الانوار من مشکاه الاسرار لعمرک ان القلب لفی وله و ان الروح لفی
subcodes.subjects: @fire and light; fire and water, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God, @light and darkness
